titleStmt.title: SII 16.329: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 329. (A.R. No. 167 of 1921.) MAHĀDĒVAMALAI, GUDIYATTAM TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south and west walls of the central shrine in the Mahādēvasvāmin temple.
The record is broken and a few lines in the beginning are lost.

It registers the gift of the village Kāvaṁguppa in Kā[vanū]ri-sīma by Mahānāyaṅkāchārya Bōḍi Koṇḍama-nāyaka, son of Nala Koṇḍama-nāyaka and grandson of Vīra Nāgi-nāyaka, to god Mahādēva of the Mahādēvunikoṇḍa (Mahādēvamalai).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tāpa śrīvīra veṁkaṭrāyadēvamahā
rāyalayavāru penuṁgoṁḍa
nagaramaṁdu ratnasiṁhvāsanārūḍhulayi
vuṁḍi sāṁbrājyaṁ cēyuṁcunnuṁḍa
ṁgānu śrīmanmahānāyaṁkācāriyulayi
na vīra nāgināyaniṁgāri pavutṛlayina nala
goṁḍemanāyaniṁgāri pavutṛ layina Readputru
bōḍi koṁḍamanāyaniṁgāru
mahādēvunikoṁḍa mahādēvasvāmiki
sama¨rpiṁcina dānadha¨rmasāsenakramaThe letters enclosed in brackets are deliberately erased on the stone.
meṭlaṁnanu veṁ kaṭarāyalayyaThe
vāru māku [A] maravuṁbaḷi maṁniṁThe letters enclosed in brackets are deliberately erased on the stone.
cina kāvanū risīmalōna naḍice The
kāvaṁguppagrāmaṁ mahādēva
svāmi śōḍasvacārapūja
¨rpiṁcināraṁ ganaka mahādēvasvāmi śaṁ
ka¨rttalaina gurustānaṁ pālaya vāri
ṁcina pālaya śiṣyaṁḍu yi kā
ma komāruṁḍu Aṇāmala dēvara
vasānagrāmaṁ śama¨rpiṁcināraṁ kanaka
ṁdrā¨rkkamuṁnu grāmāna kaligina pupānya (?)
la dēvarakoṁḍāni mahādēvasvāmi sō
ḍasupacārapūja śēśuka sukānavuṁ
ḍēdi .
Digital edition of SII 16.329 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
